itinerary.title: Singapore Ladies Shopping Tour
itinerary.overview:
Orchard Road • Marina Bay • Bugis Street • Local Gems • Exclusive Shopping 04 Nights / 05 Days Ultimate Singapore Ladies Shopping Expedition SERIAL CODE: SG-008 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-SIN-SHOP-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Singapore CATEGORY: Premium Ladies Shopping Tour Package DURATION: 04 Nights / 05 Days Singapore Shopping Districts

TOUR OVERVIEW
Indulge in a world-class shopping experience with our TRAGUIN curated Singapore Ladies Shopping Tour. From the high-end luxury boutiques of Orchard Road to the vibrant local gems in Bugis Street, this journey is tailored for style, comfort, and the ultimate retail therapy, ensuring unforgettable memories in Singapore. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: SG-008 | Singapore Ladies Shopping Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Singapore package (SG-008 / TRG-SIN-SHOP-2026): Orchard Road • Marina Bay • Bugis Street • Local Gems • Exclusive Shopping with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

days.title: ARRIVAL & ORCHARD ROAD PREVIEW
days.description: Arrive in Singapore. Private transfer to your premium hotel. Begin your shopping adventure with a leisurely preview of the world-famous Orchard Road.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: ULTIMATE LUXURY RETAIL THERAPY
days.description: A full day dedicated to luxury flagship stores and designer boutiques in the city’s premier shopping belts, an exclusive experience for style lovers.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: BUGIS STREET & LOCAL TREASURES
days.description: Explore the vibrant markets of Bugis Street. Discover unique local gems, trendy fashion, and traditional crafts in this lively Singapore shopping experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: MARINA BAY & RELAXED SHOPPING
days.description: Enjoy upscale shopping at Marina Bay Sands. Conclude the day with a relaxed evening of fine dining, celebrating your unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium shopping expedition.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
